COURT ORDERS RESP SHALL PAY PETN $400 PER MONTH SPOUSAL SUPPORT EFFECTIVE 11/1/99 UNTIL PETN BECOMES EMPLOYED. COURT ADVISES PETN THAT SHE NEEDS TO MAKE A GOOD FAITH E
FFORT TO BECOME SELF-SUPPORTING. IF/WHEN SHE BECOMES EMPLOYED, SHE IS TO NOTIFY RESP. ARREARAGES OWED BY RESP TO PETN FROM AUGUST 1999-JANUARY 2000
D, ARREARAGES ARE TO BE PAID AT $200 PER MONTH. ATTORNEY FEES ARE ORDERED PAYABLE BY RESP AT $50 PER MONTH AND SHALL INCREASE TO $100 PER MONTH WHEN
FROM THE IRS. FINAL DISCLOSURES ARE WAIVED. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT OF DISSOLUTION IS GRANTED INCLUDING THE TERMS AS STATED ON THE RECORD AND PARTIES
ARE RESTORED TO THE STATUS OF SINGLE PERSONS EFFECTIVE THIS DATE. REVIEW TO BE SET IN JUNE 2001. PETN TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. (404-SBK) DIANA PADILLA CSR 	975
